zh.lifeSummary: 當Susan Stedman於1490年出生在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯金洛斯時，她的父親Charles Stedman20歲，母親Janet Neilson19歲。她於1509年與Charles Alexander Barton Stedman在蘇格蘭費伏聖 莫南斯結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年在蘇格蘭費伏聖 莫南斯享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stedman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Steadman
meanings: occupational or topographic name from Middle English stede ‘place, farm, estate’ (Old English stede) + -man, used for someone who lived or worked on a farm, or who lived at a place so named. Compare Stead .
occupational name for someone who worked with horses, from Middle English sted(e) ‘horse, stallion’ (Old English steda) + -man. Compare Steed .

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Susan Stedman was born in 1490, in Kinross, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Charles Stedman, was 20 and her mother, Janet Neilson, was 19. She married Charles Alexander Barton Stedman in 1509, in St Monans, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1565, in St Monans, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 75.

Elle a épousé Charles Alexander Barton Stedman en 1509, à St Monans, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1565, à St Monans, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Susan Stedman(이)가 1490년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 킨로스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles Stedman(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Neilson(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1509년 스컷랜드 피프 스트 몬아스에서 Charles Alexander Barton Stedman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 스컷랜드 피프 스트 몬아스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.
